# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a React application. Install Node.js, run npm install, build the production bundle with npm run build, and serve it with a lightweight HTTP server. Keep the Dockerfile simple and easy to understand for our team.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:18-alpine AS build

WORKDIR /app

COPY package*.json ./

RUN npm ci --only=production=false

COPY . .

RUN npm run build


FROM node:18-alpine

WORKDIR /app

RUN npm install -g serve

COPY --from=build /app/build ./build

RUN addgroup -g 1001 -S nodejs && \
    adduser -S reactuser -u 1001 && \
    chown -R reactuser:nodejs /app

USER reactuser

EXPOSE 3000

CMD ["serve", "-s", "build", "-l", "3000"]
